lessons_learned: Test infrastructure exists (4 validation PowerShell scripts) but is not integrated into AUTODEV pipeline

GUT framework is documented in agent specs (debug_qa.md) but not yet installed in project
Test review worker cannot function effectively without test_results.json and stats_summary.json inputs
